name: vocdoni
description: Vocdoni's curated skills marketplace for Claude Code. One plugin per language/topic.

plugins.name: vocdoni-go
plugins.description: Go skills: Rob Pike's proverbs, production-grade quality checklist (with deep reference), and version-aware modern Go syntax.

plugins.name: vocdoni-sdk
plugins.description: Exhaustive reference for the Vocdoni SDK (@vocdoni/sdk): client setup, accounts, every census type, all election variants (approval/ranked/multichoice/budget/quadratic), anonymous (ZK) voting, CSP, and Census3, with copy-pasteable runnable recipes.

plugins.name: davinci-sdk
plugins.description: Reference for the Vocdoni Davinci SDK (@vocdoni/davinci-sdk): the high-level DavinciSDK facade for the zk-based voting protocol — create-process, encrypted (ElGamal + zk-SNARK) voting, every census type (Merkle/dynamic/CSP/on-chain), ballot-mode configuration, lifecycle, and results, with runnable recipes and protocol grounding.

plugins.name: vocdoni-integrator-sdk
plugins.description: Reference for the Vocdoni Integrator SDK — the SaaS-first toolkit that replaces @vocdoni/sdk with small packages: @vocdoni/api-client (typed SaaS HTTP client), @vocdoni/api-voting (CSP auth, vote envelopes, ballot encryption, tx signing), @vocdoni/api-voting-zk (anonymous voting), and headless @vocdoni/react-providers / @vocdoni/react-components. Covers the bundle auth → check → sign → build-tx → relay/job vote flow, encrypted ballots, and React integration, with runnable recipes.

plugins.name: pi-subagent
plugins.description: Delegate to named Pi subagents (.md persona + model + tools, incl. MCP) and bounded coding tasks from Claude Code. Bundles a local stdio MCP server that launches Pi (pi --mode rpc), isolates code edits in git worktrees, and returns compact summaries plus diff paths — never applying changes automatically.
